title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入泰国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入泰國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Thailand TISI/TIS battery standards, ERC electricity licensing and grid-connection expectations, fire-safety review, EMC, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与泰国TISI/TIS电池标准、ERC电力许可和并网要求、消防安全审查、EMC及UN 38.3运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與泰國TISI/TIS電池標準、ERC電力許可和併網要求、消防安全審查、EMC及UN 38.3運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TISI compulsory-standard scope determination, ERC licence or grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Thailand TISI, ERC, grid, fire-code, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TISI强制标准适用范围裁定、ERC许可或并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行泰国TISI、ERC、电网、消防规范、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TISI強制標準適用範圍裁定、ERC許可或併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行泰國TISI、ERC、電網、消防規範、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Thailand, do not assume a whole-container BESS product certificate is mandatory unless a specific Thai compulsory-standard or project instrument says so. The practical gap is usually component and project diligence: TISI/TIS or IEC battery evidence for cells and batteries, ERC and utility requirements for electricity projects and grid connection, UN 38.3 transport evidence, fire-safety review, EMC evidence, and mapping China GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558 evidence to Thai project requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口泰国时，除非有具体泰国强制标准或项目文件明确要求，不应假定整柜BESS产品证书属于强制要求。实际差距通常在部件和项目尽调：电芯和电池的TISI/TIS或IEC证据、ERC及电网公司对电力项目和并网的要求、UN 38.3运输证据、消防安全审查、EMC证据，以及将中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558证据映射到泰国项目要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口泰國時，除非有具體泰國強制標準或項目文件明確要求，不應假定整櫃BESS產品證書屬於強制要求。實際差距通常在部件和項目盡調：電芯和電池的TISI/TIS或IEC證據、ERC及電網公司對電力項目和併網的要求、UN 38.3運輸證據、消防安全審查、EMC證據，以及將中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558證據映射到泰國項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
